data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies user decision-making by limiting options.
data.technical_spec: Uses clear navigation paths and minimized choice overload.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designs interactive elements that are easy to reach.
data.technical_spec: Prioritizes clickable areas for navigational efficiency.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Organizes UI elements for perceived visual unity.
data.technical_spec: Groups similar items and ensures proximity and alignment.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Breaks down complex information into digestible chunks.
data.technical_spec: Uses concise text and structured information hierarchy.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Utilizes familiar designs to leverage existing user experience.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to web usability conventions for a familiar user experience.
